title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.490 - Treble damages if waste was wantonly committed
text:
537.490.  Treble damages if waste was wantonly committed. — If in any action for waste, the jury find that the waste was wantonly committed, judgment shall be entered for three times the amount of the damages assessed.
(RSMo 1939 § 3010) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2623; 1919 § 6917; 1909 § 7920
